ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the abstract of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the study is conducted */,
  "data_usage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data usage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_data_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_usage_id") REFERENCES data_usage_types ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_abstract_id FOREIGN KEY ("abstract_id") REFERENCES abstracts ("abstract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the subject is involved in */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject's characteristics */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the subjects */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subjects */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the subjects (e.g., ASD, typical development) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subjects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subjects_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage_types" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data usage type */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of data usage (e.g., Primary Analysis, Secondary Analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data usage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abstracts" (
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abstract */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study corresponding to the abstract */,
  "abstract_text" TEXT /* Full text of the abstract */,
  "research_questions" TEXT /* Research questions addressed in the study */,
  "objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the study */,
  "methods" TEXT /* Methods used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abstract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abstracts_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the study data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research design */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study using this design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the research design */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the study */,
  "sampling_strategy" TEXT /* Sampling strategy used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_designs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the result belongs to */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Key findings from the study */,
  "statistical_analysis" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis used */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the findings */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the funding was granted */,
  "award_number" TEXT /* Award number of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the presentation belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the presentation */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference where the presentation was given */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of presentation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date of data sharing */,
  "sharing_partner" TEXT /* Name of the data sharing partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
